title: AxolotlMC ModPack
description: Modpack that features optimilization with certain addons voice chat. Mostly used on AxolotlMC.pl
body:
# Modpack focused on optimalization.

Hi! This modpack is purely made for high performance and pure cosmeticly.

Feel free to unlock and unpair modpack to add your own mods!


This modpack is used on our Minecraft server: AxolotlMC.pl ! Feel free to check it out. 
DISCLAIMER: Server is mainly polish.
